title: trifolium bifidum var. decipiens
intro: Trifolium bifidum var. decipiens, also known as the small-flowered hop clover, is a perennial herb belonging to the legume family, Fabaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Trifolium bifidum var. decipiens are said to include relief from respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as its potential to soothe digestive problems and reduce fever. Trifolium bifidum var. decipiens is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be consumed as a dried plant extract.
